It also includes Howie Mandel as the Sandman and Sinbad as a raven. As the younger sister of actress Dakota Fanning, she made her film debut as the younger version of her sister's character in the drama film "I Am Sam" (2001). baseline.final_answer: Dakota Fanning has been a member of the cast in "Hansel and Gretel" (2002), "I Am Sam" (2001), "Because of Winn-Dixie" (2005), "Babel" (2006), "Phoebe in Wonderland" (2008), "Daddy Day Care" (2002), "The Door in the Floor" (2004), and "Super 8" (2011).
